name: upkeep
description: macOS system cleanup and updater with an AI-driven update advisor. v1.3 adds three new agents to /upkeep:update: changelog-reader fetches upstream release notes (allowlisted hosts only) and grades each major/medium-risk bump as low/medium/high/critical; project-impact scans your workspaces and surfaces 'this will affect N of your projects'; failure-diagnoser turns post-apply errors into copy-paste fix suggestions (surfaced as text only, never auto-executed). v1.2 prompt-injection hardening preserved: hardcoded dispatcher, discovery JSON sanitization, exact-match remote URL validation, trust-on-first-use for skill repos, Discover/Approve/Apply turn separation. v1.1 parallel discovery and Linux/WSL2 paths unchanged. Five entry points: deep, quick, audit, update, upkeep.
